Hardware Component File

EPS6_HCB_DHN_SWEET400_V1.0

System Identification and Configuration Data

Metadata

File reference EPS6_HCB_DHN_SWEET400_V1.0__20211118T164235.json
Source type JSON Data Array
Status
Validated

Technical Warning

Ensure specific OBD protocol matching before hardware implementation to avoid controller lockout.

Safety Guidelines →

OBD Configuration Details

Protocol CAN
Baudrate 10400
Send ID 742
Receive ID 762
Functional Addr 04
Functional Name EPS

Automatic Identifiers

Array Listing 1 Entries 
[
  {
    "diagversion": "10",
    "supplier": "JTEKT",
    "soft": "BD009s_U008_DB403               ",
    "version": "BD009s_U008_DB403_DB403         "
  }
]

Associated Devices

[C1601]BATTERY VOLT ID:
[C1624]Very_soft_ramp_down ID:
(C1606)Motor Failure ID:
CAN VDC communication ID:
(C1604) internal failure, within the torque sensor (main) ID:
(C1654) internal failure, within the torque sensor (sub) ID:
(C1656) Motor failure (sub) ID:
[C1608]CONTROL unit failure (main) ID:
(C1658) control unit failure (sub) ID:
[U1321]EPS not fully configured ID:
(U1312) EPS SW un-match ID:
[C1615]Over heat in EPS controller ID:
(C1616) Over heat in Motor (main) ID:
(C165A) Over heat in EPS controller (sub) ID:
(C165B) Over heat in Motor (sub) ID:
(C1618) EPS-SWA configuration ID:
(C1651) BATTERY VOLTAGE (sub) ID:
(U0076) CAN BUSS OFF fault (for Diagmux DTC) ID:
(C1630) CAN BUSS OFF Fault on 1ch (for function DTC) ID:
(U2A0B) CAN BUSS OFF Fault on 2ch (ForDiagMux DTC) ID:
(C1645) CAN BUSS OFF fault on 2ch (for function DTC) ID:
(C165C) EPS is in very soft ramp down mode(sub) ID:
(C163A) ADAS failure ID:
(C163E) CDM failure ID:
(C162A) Missing frame userPreference signal (METER) ID:
(C1636) Missing frame UserPreference signal (IVI) ID:
(C163D) Missing or unreliable control requests for APA (AVM Failure) ID:
(C1640) Unreliable or absent WheelSpeeds for CH2 ID:
(C160B) Torque sensor nor calibrated ID:
(C160C) VIN not programmed ID:

ECUDocs

The industry standard for automotive hardware ECU documentation. Providing precise wiring diagrams and pinout specifications for technicians and enthusiasts worldwide.
